title: The return value of ReactDOM.render should be avoided
description: The return value of "ReactDOM.render" should not be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoIn React, theReactDOM.render()method is used to render a React component into a DOM element. It has a return value, but it’s generally recommended not to use it. The method might return a reference to the rootReactComponentinstance, but it can be unpredictable and may not always be useful.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
